components.name: dipotassium hydrogen phosphate
components.evidence: Cyanothece 51142 was routinely maintained in modified ASP-2 medium, containing 17 mM NH4Cl, 0.03 mM FeCl3, and 0.75 mM K2HPO4

components.name: ammonium chloride
components.evidence: NH4+-limited chemostat cultures were established ... using modified low-N ASP-2 containing 0.75 mM NH4Cl delivered at a 0.05 h-1 dilution rate

components.name: ferric chloride
components.role: iron source (added separately, in addition to PII trace Fe)
components.evidence: modified ASP-2 medium, containing 17 mM NH4Cl, 0.03 mM FeCl3, and 0.75 mM K2HPO4

components.name: boric acid
components.evidence: PII Trace Metals (Provasoli 1968), per liter of stock: H3BO3 ... 11.439 g (9.25 x 10-5 M in ES final medium)

components.name: manganese sulfate
components.evidence: PII Trace Metals (Provasoli 1968), per liter of stock: MnSO4 . 4H2O ... 1.624 g (3.64 x 10-5 M)

components.name: zinc sulfate heptahydrate
components.evidence: PII Trace Metals (Provasoli 1968), per liter of stock: ZnSO4 . 7H2O ... 0.220 g (3.82 x 10-6 M)

components.name: cobalt sulfate heptahydrate
components.evidence: PII Trace Metals (Provasoli 1968), per liter of stock: CoSO4 . 7H2O ... 0.048 g (8.48 x 10-7 M)

components.name: HEPES-Na (or Tris) buffer
components.concentration: 20 mM (40 mL of 0.5 M per L in base ASP-2; bioreactor pH controlled at 7.5)
components.evidence: ASP-2 Medium (per liter): ... HEPES-Na buffer (0.5 M, pH 8): 40 mL

components.name: O2 (facultative)
components.role: oxygen; external O2 absent under pure-Ar sparge but produced internally by oxygenic photosynthesis
components.evidence: sparging with 1.3% CO2-Ar gas mix ... (this variant record = pure Ar atmosphere, no CO2)

media.base_medium: Modified low-N ASP-2 (van Baalen 1962 modification of Provasoli's ASP artificial seawater) for Cyanothece sp. ATCC 51142; nitrogen-limited (0.75 mM NH4Cl, nitrate omitted), sparged with pure Ar (no CO2).

sources_chased.what: primary paper PMC3419522 (medium name, N source, Fe, phosphate, gas)
base ASP-2 recipe (ref 34 = van Baalen 1962), via cellreg.org ASP-2 / ASP-2-N listing
added: NaNO3 confirmed OMITTED in ASP-2-N / low-N variant

sources_chased.how: WebFetch + Read NCMA ES Medium PDF (ncma.bigelow.org)

media.notes: Union recipe recovered. Nitrogen is NH4Cl only at 0.75 mM (nitrate omitted, ASP-2-N base); N-deprivation in the paper is achieved by interrupting the chemostat feed. This record is the pure-Ar (no CO2) variant, so NO inorganic carbon/bicarbonate is supplied in the gas and there is no organic carbon in the defined medium; the sister condition uses 1.3% CO2-Ar. Trace-metal concentrations (Co/Zn ~exact, Mn within 30%) are consistent with PII metals dosed at ~0.1 mL/L into ASP-2. Vitamin B12 (cyanocobalamin) is present in many ASP/ES seawater media but is NOT specified for van Baalen's modified ASP-2 in any source obtained, so it is deliberately not listed (no fabrication). HEPES/Tris buffer is from the cited base recipe but the 5.5-L bioreactor holds pH 7.5 actively, so effective buffer concentration is uncertain (low confidence on that one line).
